label: Barbiere

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Extreme close-up, Italian barber's hands holding a straight razor on client's neck. Phone on counter vibrating. He cannot move, one millimeter error means blood. Three vibrations. Then silence. Missed call. Warm barbershop interior, vintage mirrors, leather chairs, afternoon light. Slow subtle push-in, shallow DOF, tense atmosphere, desaturated tones, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of handwritten price list 'Taglio: 25 euro, Barba: 15 euro'. Then empty barber chair with cape draped on armrest. Late afternoon light, silence, loneliness. Slow pan across empty barbershop, warm but melancholic, documentary style, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: In Italia le barberie sono cresciute del quaranta percento in cinque anni. La concorrenza e tre porte piu in la. Ogni chiamata persa e un cliente regalato.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Empty barber chair, cape hanging, harsh light from window. Phone face-down on counter showing missed calls notification. Cold stark atmosphere, high contrast shadows, still camera, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same Italian barber, razor in hand, client satisfied in mirror. Phone silently shows 'Sara: appuntamento confermato per Giovanni, domani 10:30'. He hasn't touched anything. Adjacent chair is occupied. Warm golden light, rich saturated tones, confident atmosphere, smooth dolly, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, Sara risponde mentre tu hai il rasoio in mano. Prenota, conferma, manda il promemoria. I tuoi clienti restano tuoi. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, shallow depth of field, authentic Italian barbershop, warm vintage feel

music_gen_config.genre_hint: classic confident, acoustic guitar with light drums, traditional cool

prompts.tense: tense minimal, low acoustic guitar plucks, sparse percussion, uneasy atmosphere, minor key, 75bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: confident classic rock light, acoustic guitar melody, warm drums, optimistic, major key, 105bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], ho una barberia vicino a me che ha perso il 20% della clientela in sei mesi.
Non per colpa del taglio. Per le chiamate perse.
[VIDEO] - 30 secondi.
